comment: Base entity for all party identification documents and credentials according to TMForum SID Party ABE

contents.name: ID
contents.comment: Unique identifier for the party identification record

contents.name: identificationId
contents.comment: The actual identification number (e.g., passport number, license number)

contents.name: identificationType
contents.comment: Type of identification (e.g., Passport, National ID, Driver License)

contents.name: issueDate
contents.comment: Date when the identification was issued

contents.name: issuingAuthority
contents.comment: Authority or organization that issued the identification

contents.name: issuingCountry
contents.comment: Country where the identification was issued (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code)

contents.name: scan
contents.comment: URL or base64 encoded scan/image of the identification document

contents.name: status
contents.comment: Status of the identification (e.g., active, expired, revoked, suspended)

contents.name: verified
contents.comment: Indicates whether the identification has been verified

contents.name: verifiedDate
contents.comment: Date when the identification was last verified

contents.name: validFor
contents.comment: Time period during which the identification is valid

contents.name: attachmentURL
contents.comment: URL to attached document or supporting files

contents.name: PartyIdentificationIdentifies
contents.comment: The party that this identification belongs to

contents.name: PartyIdentificationDeliveredBy
contents.comment: The organization that delivered/issued this identification (relationship 0..*)

contents.name: PartyIdentificationWrittenIn
contents.comment: The language(s) in which the identification is written (relationship 0..*)
